message:
feat(web): add 'use no memo' directive to React hooks and components

Adds the React Compiler opt-out directive to several hooks and components
that should not be auto-memoized:

Hooks affected:
- useCAAM.ts - CAAM account manager hooks
- useDashboard.ts - Dashboard state management
- useFleet.ts - RU fleet API hooks
- usePipelines.ts - Pipeline management
- useSafetyPosture.ts - Safety posture hooks
- useSetup.ts - Setup wizard hooks
- useSnapshot.ts - Snapshot management

Components affected:
- websocket-context.tsx - WebSocket provider context
- Beads.tsx - Beads management page

The 'use no memo' directive prevents React Compiler from automatically
memoizing these modules, which is needed when:
- The component/hook has complex internal state that doesn't benefit from memoization
- The cost of memo tracking exceeds the benefit
- The module has side effects that shouldn't be deduplicated

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
